title: polyspora elliptica
intro: Polyspora elliptica, also known as Indian gentian, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polyspora elliptica include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its use in treating respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application for its antiseptic properties.
